empty: No files in this catalog yet.
orphanTitle: No registry entry references this file. Left behind by a crash or hand-edit; safe to delete.
renameInvalid: Names can't be empty or contain a slash.
renameConflict: A file or folder with that name already exists.
renameFailed: Couldn't rename — see console for details.
deleteFailed: Couldn't delete — see console for details.
